## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is your request related to a pain point?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references, or any other context.
